{{WIP}}

{{Forms
|form=Zombie
|description=In Zombie Form, you tear limbs off your enemies and digest them with a special acid, turning biomatter into evolutionary catalysts
|sequence1={{RewardIconWithText|Brain Parasite}}
|source1=The [[Vending Machine]]
|effect=In Zombie Form, Snail HP +5% <br>Explore in Zombie Form, gain +2% Evo Chests <br>Free Research Speedup (Zombie) +5m
|reward={{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +5k}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Zombie Cell, +1.2k}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +50}}
|sequence2={{RewardIconWithText|Alien Hookworm}}
|source2=[[Chichikaka]] friendship storyline
|sequence3={{RewardIconWithText|Despot Cells}}
|source3=Defeat the [[Robot Guard]]
|sequence4={{RewardIconWithText|Antiseptic Stone}}
|source4=Unlock all 5 [[Evolution|Forms]]
|t1=Grave Keeper
|hp1=20
|atk1=20
|def1=10
|rush1=10
|t2=Cursed Corpse
|t3=Abomination
|t4=Scavenger
|t5=The Despot
|t6=Insomniac
|t7=Source of Unholiness
|t1Rows={{FormRow
|segment=1A<br>HP Up Z-I
|time1=0:20:00
|cellCost1=100
|btadCost1=50
|effect1=Snail HP +50
|inc1=10
}}{{FormRow
|segment=1B<br>ATK Up Z-I
|time1=0:30:00
|cellCost1=150
|btadCost1=75
|effect1=Snail ATK +10
|inc1=12
}}{{FormRow
|segment=1C<br>FAME Up Z-I
|time1=0:40:00
|cellCost1=200
|btadCost1=100
|effect1=Snail FAME +50<br>Explore in Zombie Form, gain +1% Evo Chests
|inc1=16
}}{{FormRow
|segment=2A<br>HP Up Gene Z-I
|time1=0:20:00
|cellCost1=100
|btadCost1=50
|effect1=Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop HP +60
|inc1=10
}}{{FormRow
|segment=2B<br>ATK Up Gene Z-I
|time1=0:30:00
|cellCost1=150
|btadCost1=75
|effect1=Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop ATK +6
|inc1=12
}}{{FormRow
|segment=2C<br>All Genes Up Z-I
|time1=0:40:00
|cellCost1=200
|btadCost1=100
|effect1=Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +2
|inc1=16
}}{{FormRow
|segment=3<br>Genetic Resonance
|time1=0:30:00
|cellCost1=150
|btadCost1=75
|effect1=Dispatchable Research Partners +1
|inc1=30
}}{{FormRow
|segment=4<br>Zombie Gene Lock II
|time1=1:00:00
|cellCost1=600
|btadCost1=300
|effect1=Advance to Zombie Form T2: Cursed Corpse<br>Zombie Minion Max Tier Up
|inc1=30
}}
|t2Rows=
|t3Rows=
|t4Rows=
|t5Rows=
|t6Rows=
|t7Rows=
|t8Rows=
|3to4={{!}}-
{{!}}Obtain {{RewardIconWithText|Zombie Toxin}} from Super Gene Expert
{{!}}Speak with the [[Mailbox#Super Gene Expert|Super Gene Expert]] from the [[Mailbox]]
{{!}}-
{{!}}Ascend after FAME reaches 4,000
{{!}}Can be raised through FAME relics and mirages
|4to5={{!}}-
{{!}}Explore [[Koryeo]] in Zombie Form and find 5 Pusan Viruses
{{!}}Explore Koryeo in Zombie form 
{{!}}-
{{!}}Defeat the Viruses and obtain 5 {{RewardIconGeneSegment|No.0}}
{{!}}Fight each of the 5 Viruses. This will take multiple explorations
{{!}}-
{{!}}Clear the [[Gene Simulation|Ultimate Virus Trial]]
{{!}}Defeat all 10 levels in Zombie Form
{{!}}-
{{!}}Reach Zombie Form Trial Lv.100
{{!}}The last Zombie has a strength of 747k 
{{!}}-
{{!}}Ascend when FAME reaches 8,000
{{!}}Raise your FAME by obtaining and upgrading FAME relics and completing FAME mirages
|5to6={{!}}-
{{!}}Clear [[Fisure#0-199-0|Tutankhamun's Tomb]] ([[Fissure]] Fl.13)
{{!}}This event will be automatically added to the completed event
{{!}}-
{{!}}Slumber for 36 hours in Pharaoh's grave
{{!}}"Sleep!" in Fissure Fl.13 for 36h to complete. Rewards Zombie Cell +3,000
{{!}}-
{{!}}Reach Zombie Form Trial Lv.200
{{!}}-
{{!}}Ascend after FAME reaches 15,000
|6to7={{!}}-
{{!}}Equip 11 {{RewardIconWithGearlink|green|Material|Black Pearl}}
{{!}}-
{{!}}Display the awakened {{RewardIconWithLink|Tee Virus|blue}}
{{!}}-
{{!}}Display the awakened {{RewardIconWithLink|Gee Virus|purple}}
{{!}}-
{{!}}Display the awakened {{RewardIconWithLink|Gene Map|purple}}
{{!}}-
{{!}}Display the awakened {{RewardIconWithLink|Shroud of Turin|orange}}
{{!}}-
{{!}}Reach Zombie Form Trial Lv.300
{{!}}-
{{!}}Ascend after FAME reaches 20,000
}}
<!-- 
===Extra Boosts===
After T4, FAME [[relics]] can be awakened for extra boosts.
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" cellpadding="8"
!Relics Awakened !!Boosts
|-
|1
|In All Forms, Snail HP +500
|-
|10
|In All Forms, Snail HP +5000
|-
|20
|
|}

{{FormRow
|segment=1A<br>DEF Up Z-I
|time1=1:00:00
|cellCost1=250
|btadCost1=250
|effect1=Snail DEF +10
|inc1=20
}}{{FormRow
|segment=1B<br>RUSH Up Z-I
|time1=1:15:00
|cellCost1=300
|btadCost1=300
|effect1=Snail RUSH +10
|inc1=24
}}{{FormRow
|segment=1C<br>FAME Up Z-I
|time1=1:30:00
|cellCost1=350
|btadCost1=350
|effect1=Snail FAME +50
|inc1=28
}}{{FormRow
|segment=2A<br>DEF Up Gene Z-I
|time1=1:00:00
|cellCost1=250
|btadCost1=250
|effect1=Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop DEF +6
|inc1=20
}}{{FormRow
|segment=2B<br>SPD Up Gene Z-I
|time1=1:15:00
|cellCost1=300
|btadCost1=300
|effect1=Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +6
|inc1=24
}}{{FormRow
|segment=2C<br>All Genes up Z-I||1||1:30:00||350||350||Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +2||28
|-
|style="text-align:center"|3<br>Tee Virus||1||1:15:00||300||300||{{Relink|Tee Virus|blue}} +20||75
|-
|style="text-align:center"|4<br>Zombie Gene Lock III||1||3:00:00||1,200||1,200||Advance to Zombie Form T3<br>Abomination<br>Zombie Minion Max Tier Up||50
|}
|-|T3=
{|class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!rowspan="2"|
!rowspan="2"|Lv.
!colspan="3"|Cost
!rowspan="2"|Effect
!rowspan="2"|DNA Strength<br>Increase
|-
!Time
!Cells
!B-tads
|-
| rowspan="5" style="text-align:center" |1A<br>HP Up Z-II
|1||1:30:00||400||600||Snail HP +20 ||30
|-
|2||2:00:00||600|| 900||Snail HP +50||45
|-
|3||2:30:00||800||1,200||Snail HP +90||60
|-
|4||3:00:00||1,000||1,500||Snail HP +140||75
|-
|5||3:30:00||1,200||8,000||Snail HP +200||90
|-
| rowspan="5" style="text-align:center" |1B<br>ATK Up Z-II
|1||1:45:00||600||900||Snail ATK +4||36
|-
|2||2:30:00||900||1,350||Snail ATK +10||54
|-
|3||3:15:00||1,200||1,800||Snail ATK +18||72
|-
|4||4:00:00||1,500||2,250||Snail ATK +28||90
|-
|5||4:45:00||1,800||2,700||Snail ATK +40||108
|-
| rowspan="5" style="text-align:center" |1C<br>FAME Up Z-II
|1||2:00:00||800||1,200||Snail FAME +20<br>When in Zombie Form:<br>Gain +1% Evo Chests in explorations||42
|-
|2||3:00:00||1,200||1,800||Snail FAME +50<br>When in Zombie Form:<br>Gain +1.5% Evo Chests in explorations||63
|-
|3||4:00:00||1,600||2,400||Snail FAME +90<br>When in Zombie Form:<br>Gain +2% Evo Chests in explorations||84
|-
|4||5:00:00||2,000||3,000||Snail FAME +140<br>When in Zombie Form:<br>Gain +2.5% Evo Chests in explorations||105
|-
|5||6:00:00||2,400||3,600||Snail FAME +200<br>When in Zombie Form:<br>Gain +3% Evo Chests in explorations||126
|-
| rowspan="5" style="text-align:center" |2A<br>HP Up Gene Z-II
|1||1:30:00||400||600||Per 10 Zombie Minions in  battle, Troop HP +30||30
|-
|2||2:00:00||600||900||Per 10 Zombie Minions in  battle, Troop HP +60||45
|-
|3||2:30:00||800||1,200||Per 10 Zombie Minions in  battle, Troop HP +90||60
|-
|4||3:00:00||1,000||1,500||Per 10 Zombie Minions in  battle, Troop HP +120||75
|-
|5||3:30:00||1,200||1,800||Per 10 Zombie Minions in  battle, Troop HP +150||90
|-
| rowspan="5" style="text-align:center" |2B<br>ATK Up Gene Z-II
|1||1:45:00||600||900||Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop ATK +3||36
|-
|2||2:30:00||900||1,350||Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop ATK +9||54
|-
|3||3:15:00||1,200||1,800||Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop ATK +12||72
|-
|4||4:00:00||1,500||2,250||Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop ATK +12||90
|-
|5||4:45:00||1,800||2,700||Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop ATK +15||108
|-
| rowspan="5" style="text-align:center" |2C<br>All Up Gene Z-II
|1||2:00:00||800||1,200||Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>Troop HARD Stats +1||42
|-
|2||3:00:00||1,200||1,800||Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>Troop HARD Stats +2||63
|-
|3||4:00:00||1,600||2,400||Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>Troop HARD Stats +3||84
|-
|4||5:00:00||2,000||3,000||Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>Troop HARD Stats +4||105
|-
|5||6:00:00||2,400||3,600||Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>Troop HARD Stats +5||126
|-
|style="text-align:center"|3<br>Undead Staff||1||1:45:00||600||900||Obtain {{Gearlink|blue|Form|Undead Staff}}||105
|-
|style="text-align:center"|4<br>Zombie Ritual IV||1||6:00:00||3,000||4,500||Advance to Zombie Form T4<br>Scavenger<br>In Zombie Form Trials, DMG +30%<br>Zombie Minion Max Tier Up||120
|}
|-|T4=
{|class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!rowspan="2"|
!rowspan="2"|Lv.
!colspan="3"|Cost
!rowspan="2"|Effect
!rowspan="2"|DNA Strength<br>Increase
|-
!Time
!Cells
!B-tads
|-
|rowspan="5" style="text-align:center"|1A<br>DEF Up Gene Z-II
|1||2:00:00||1,000||2,000||Per 10 Zombie Minions in  battle, Troop DEF +3||48
|-
|2||3:30:00||1,800||3,600||Per 10 Zombie Minions in  battle, Troop DEF +6||72
|-
|3||5:00:00||2,600||5,200||Per 10 Zombie Minions in  battle, Troop DEF +9||96
|-
|4||6:30:00||3,400||6,800||Per 10 Zombie Minions in  battle, Troop DEF +12||120
|-
|5||8:00:00||4,200||8,400||Per 10 Zombie Minions in  battle, Troop DEF +15||144
|-
|rowspan="5" style="text-align:center"|1B<br>SPD Up Gene Z-II
|1||3:00:00||2,000||4,000||Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +3||54
|-
|2||5:00:00||3,600||7,200||Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +6||81
|-
|3||7:00:00||5,200||10,400||Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +9||108
|-
|4||9:00:00||6,800||13,600||Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +12||135
|-
|5||11:00:00||8,400||16,800||Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop RUSH +15||162
|-
|rowspan="5" style="text-align:center"|1C<br>All Up Gene Z-II
|1||4:00:00||3,000||6,000||Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>Troop HARD Stats +1||60
|-
|2||7:00:00||5,400||10,800||Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>Troop HARD Stats +2||90
|-
|3||10:00:00||7,800||15,600||Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>Troop HARD Stats +3||120
|-
|4||13:00:00||10,200||20,400||Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>Troop HARD Stats +4||150
|-
|5||16:00:00||12,600||25,200||Per 10 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>Troop HARD Stats +5||180
|-
|rowspan="5" style="text-align:center"|2A<br>DEF Up Z-II
|1||2:00:00||1,000||2,000||Snail DEF +4||48
|-
|2||3:30:00||1,800||3,600||Snail DEF +10||72
|-
|3||5:00:00||2,600||5,200||Snail DEF +18||96
|-
|4||6:30:00||3,400||6,800||Snail DEF +28||120
|-
|5||8:00:00||4,200||8,400||Snail DEF +40||144
|-
|rowspan="5" style="text-align:center"|2B<br>RUSH Up Z-II
|1||3:00:00||2,000||4,000||Snail RUSH +4||54
|-
|2||5:00:00||3,600||7,200||Snail RUSH +10||81
|-
|3||7:00:00||5,200||10,400||Snail RUSH +18||108
|-
|4||9:00:00||6,800||13,600||Snail RUSH +28||135
|-
|5||11:00:00||8,400||16,800||Snail RUSH +40||162
|-
|rowspan="5" style="text-align:center"|2C<br>FAME Up Z-II
|1||4:00:00||3,000||6,000||FAME +20<br>When in Zombie Form:<br>Gain +1% Evo Chests in explorations||60
|-
|2||7:00:00||5,400||10,800||FAME +50<br>When in Zombie Form:<br>Gain +1.5% Evo Chests in explorations||90
|-
|3||10:00:00||7,800||15,600||FAME +90<br>When in Zombie Form:<br>Gain +2% Evo Chests in explorations||120
|-
|4||13:00:00||10,200||20,400||FAME +140<br>When in Zombie Form:<br>Gain +2.5% Evo Chests in explorations||150
|-
|5||16:00:00||12,600||25,200||FAME +200<br>When in Zombie Form:<br>Gain +3% Evo Chests in explorations||180
|-
|style="text-align:center"|3<br>Zombie Gene Mutation
|1||3:00:00||2,000||4,000||Snail Leadership +10<br>Zombie Minion MAX +5||180
|-
|style="text-align:center"|4<br>Zombie Ritual V
|1||24:00:00||15,000||30,000||Advance to Zombie Form T5: The Despot<br>In Zombie Form Trials, DMG +30%<br>Zombie Minion Max Tier Up||160
|}
|-|T5=
{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!rowspan="2"|
!rowspan="2"|Lv.
!colspan="3"|Cost
!rowspan="2"|Effect
!rowspan="2"|DNA Strength<br>Increase
|-
!Time
!Cells
!B-tads
|-
| rowspan="10" style="text-align:center"|1A<br>HP Up Z-III
|1||6:00;00||4,000||10,000||Snail HP +60||80
|-
|2||9:00:00||5,000||12,500||Snail HP +140||120
|-
|3||12:00:00||6,000||15,000||Snail HP +240||160
|-
|4||15:00:00||7,000||17,500||Snail HP +360||200
|-
|5||18:00:00||8,000||20,000||Snail HP +500||240
|-
|6||21:00:00||9,000||22,500||Snail HP +660||280
|-
|7||24:00:00||10,000||25,000||Snail HP +840||320
|-
|8||27:00:00||11,000||27,500||Snail HP +1,040||360
|-
|9||30:00:00||12,000||30,000||Snail HP +1,260||400
|-
|10||33:00:00||13,000||32,500||Snail HP +1,500||440
|-
| rowspan="10" style="text-align:center"|1B<br>ATK Up Z-III
|1||8:00:00||6,000||15,000||Snail ATK +12||90
|-
|2||12:00:00||7,500||18,750||Snail ATK +28||135
|-
|3||16:00:00||9,000||22,500||Snail ATK +48||180||
|-
|4||20:00:00||10,500||26,250||Snail ATK +72||225
|-
|5||24:00:00||12,000||30,000||Snail ATK +100||270
|-
|6||28:00:00||13,500||33,750||Snail ATK +132||315
|-
|7||32:00:00||15,000||37,500||Snail ATK +168||360
|-
|8||36:00:00||16,500||41,250||Snail ATK +208||405
|-
|9||40:00:00||18,000||45,000||Snail ATK +252||450
|-
|10||44:00:00||19,500||48,750||Snail ATK +300||495
|-
| rowspan="10" style="text-align:center" |1C<br>FAME Up Z-III
|1||10:00:00||8,000||20,000||FAME +30<br>When in Zombie Form:<br>Gain +2% Evo Chests in explorations||100
|-
|2||15:00:00||10,000||25,000||FAME +70<br>When in Zombie Form:<br>Gain +2.5% Evo Chests in explorations||150
|-
|3||20:00:00||12,000||30,000||FAME +120<br>When in Zombie Form:<br>Gain +3% Evo Chests in explorations||200
|-
|4||25:00:00||14,000||35,000||FAME +180<br>When in Zombie Form:<br>Gain +3.5% Evo Chests in explorations||250
|-
|5||30:00:00||16,000||40,000||FAME +250<br>When in Zombie Form:<br>Gain +4% Evo Chests in explorations||300
|-
|6||35:00:00||18,000||45,000||FAME +330<br>When in Zombie Form:<br>Gain +4.5% Evo Chests in explorations||300
|-
|7||40:00:00||20,000||50,000||FAME +420<br>When in Zombie Form:<br>Gain +5% Evo Chests in explorations||400
|-
|8||45:00:00||22,000||55,000||FAME +520<br>When in Zombie Form:<br>Gain +5.5% Evo Chests in explorations||450
|-
|9||50:00:00||24,000||60,000||FAME +630<br>When in Zombie Form:<br>Gain +6% Evo Chests in explorations||500
|-
|10||55:00:00||26,000||6,500||FAME +750<br>When in Zombie Form:<br>Gain +6.5% Evo Chests in explorations||550
|-
| rowspan="10" style="text-align:center" |2A<br>HP Up Gene Z-III
|1||6:00:00||4,000||10,000||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop HP +90||80|
|-
|2||9:00:00||5,000||12,500||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop HP +180||120
|-
|3||12:00:00||6,000||15,000||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop HP +270||160
|-
|4||15:00:00||7,000||17,500||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop HP +360||200
|-
|5||18:00:00||8,000||20,000||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop HP +450||240
|-
|6||21:00:00||9,000||22,500||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop HP +540||280
|-
|7||24:00:00||10,000||25,000||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop HP +630||320
|-
|8||27:00:00||11,000||27,500||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop HP +720||360
|-
|9||30:00:00||12,000||30,000||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop HP +810||400
|-
|10||33:00:00||13,000||32,500||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop HP +900||440
|-
| rowspan="10" style="text-align:center" |2B<br>ATK Up Gene Z-III
|1||8:00:00||6,000||15,000||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop ATK +9||90
|-
|2||12:00:00||7,500||18,750||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop ATK +18||135
|-
|3||16:00:00||9,000||22,500||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop ATK +27||180
|-
|4||20:00:00||10,500||26,250||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop ATK +36||225
|-
|5||24:00:00||12,000||30,000||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop ATK +45||270
|-
|6||28:00:00||13,500||33,750||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop ATK +54||315
|-
|7||32:00:00||15,000||37,500||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop ATK +63||360
|-
|8||36:00:00||16,500||41,250||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop ATK +72||405
|-
|9||40:00:00||18,000||45,000||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop ATK +81||450
|-
|10||44:00:00||19,500||48,750||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop ATK +90||495
|-
| rowspan="10" style="text-align:center" |2C<br>All Genes Up Z-III
|1||10:00:00||8,000||20,000||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +3||100
|-
|2||15:00:00||10,000||25,000||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +6||150
|-
|3||20:00:00||12,000||30,000||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +9||200
|-
|4||25:00:00||14,000||35,000||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +12||250
|-
|5||30:00:00||16,000||40,000||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +15||300
|-
|6||35:00:00||18,000||45,000||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +18||350
|-
|7||40:00:00||20,000||50,000||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +21||400
|-
|8||45:00:00||22,000||55,000||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +24||450
|-
|9||50:00:00||24,000||60,000||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +27||500
|-
|10||55:00:00||26,000||65,000||Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle, Troop HARD Stats +30||550
|-
| rowspan="3" style="text-align:center" |3<br>Compass Upgrade
|1||20:00:00||20,000||50,000||All Compasses effect +40%||400
|-
|2||40:00:00||40,000||100,000||All Compasses effect +60%||450
|-
|3||60:00:00||60,000||150,000||All Compasses effect +80%||500
|-
| style="text-align:center" |4<br>Zombie Ritual VI
|1||120:00:00||30,000||75,000||||500
|}
|-|T6=
{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!rowspan="2"|
!rowspan="2"|Lv.
!colspan="3"|Cost
!rowspan="2"|Effect
!rowspan="2"|DNA Strength<br>Increase
|-
!Time
!Cells
!B-tads
|-
|style="text-align:center"|1A
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|style="text-align:center"|1B
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|style="text-align:center"|1C
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|style="text-align:center"|2A
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|style="text-align:center"|2B
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|style="text-align:center"|2C
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|style="text-align:center"|3
|
|
|
|
|
|
|-
|style="text-align:center"|4
|
|
|
|
|
|
|}
</tabber>

==Rank Up Rituals==
Once research is complete, a ritual will be started. Once the conditions are cleared, Zombie Form will rise from in Tier.

<tabber>
|-|T4=
For Zombie Form to rise from T3 to T4:
{|class="wikitable"
|-
!Ritual!!How to complete
|-
|Activate Sequence: {{RewardIconWithText|Brain Parasite}}
|[[Vending Machine]]
|-
|Activate Sequence: {{RewardIconWithText|Alien Hookworm}}
|Obtained during friendship with [[Chichikaka]]
|-
|Activate Sequence: {{RewardIconWithText|Despot Cells}}
|Defeat [[Robot Guard]]
|-
|Activate Sequence: {{RewardIconWithText|Antiseptic Stone}}
|Unlock all 5 forms
|-
|Get {{RewardIconWithText|Zombie Toxin}} from Super Gene Expert
|Speak with the [[Mailbox#Super Gene Expert|Super Gene Expert]] from the [[Mailbox]]
|-
|Ascend after FAME reaches 4,000
|Can be raised through FAME relics and mirages
|}
|-|T5=
For Zombie Form to rise from T4 to T5:
{|class="wikitable"
|-
!Ritual!!How to complete
|-
|Explore Koryeo and fine 5 Pusan Virus
|Explore Koryeo in Zombie form
|-
|Defeat the Viruses and obtain 5 Gene Segments
|Fight each of the 5 Viruses. This will take multiple explorations
|-
|Clear the [[Gene Simulation|Ultimate Virus Trial]]
|10 total levels in Zombie form
|-
|Reach Zombie Form Trial Lv. 100
|The last Zombie has a strength of 747k
|-
|Ascend when FAME reaches 8,000
|Raise your FAME by obtaining and upgrading FAME relics and completing FAME mirages
|}
|-|T6=
For Zombie Form to rise from T5 to T6:
{|class="wikitable"
|-
!Ritual!!How to complete
|-
|Clear [[Fissure#Fissure#0-199-0|Tutankhamun's Tomb (Fissure, Fl. 13)]]
|The event will be automatically added
|-
|Slumber for 36 hours in Pharaoh's grave
|"Sleep!" for 36h to complete. Rewards Zombie Cell +3,000
|-
|Reach Zombie Form Trial Lv. 200
|-
|Ascend after FAME reaches 15,000
|}
|-|T7=
For Zombie Form to rise from T6 to T7:
{|class="wikitable"
|-
!Ritual!!How to Complete
|-
|Equip 11 {{Gearlink|green|Material|Black Pearl}}s
|-
|Display the awakened {{Relink|Tee Virus|blue}}
|-
|Display the awakened {{Relink|Gee Virus|purple}}
|-
|Display the awakened {{Relink|Gene Map|purple}}
|-
|Display the awakened {{Relink|Shroud of Turin|orange}}
|-
|Reach Zombie Form Trial Lv.300
|-
|Ascend after FAME reaches 20,000
|}
</tabber>
